mapper.select: select u.id, u.username, u.real_name as realName, u.role from user u inner join user_course uc on u.id = uc.user_id where uc.course_id = #{courseId} and u.role = 'student' order by u.id
select u.id, u.username, u.real_name as realName, u.role from user u where u.role = 'student' and u.id not in ( select user_id from user_course where course_id = #{courseId} ) order by u.id
